title: Single-Cell Sequencing Plus Spatial Transcriptomics: Dissecting Tumor Heterogeneity, Immunosuppression, and Potential Targets for ASPSCR1::TFE3 Renal Cell Carcinoma.
snippet: ASPSCR1::TFE3 renal cell carcinoma (RCC) is a distinct subtype of renal cell carcinoma characterized by a high rate of lymph node metastasis and poor prognosis. Its unclear pathogenesis and immune microenvironment have hindered clinical treatment. This study analyzed FFPE samples of ASPSCR1::TFE3 RCC and clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) using single-...
